sql.trim: and is_delete = 0 and c.recycle = 0 and p.status = 2 and p.recycle = 0 and c.num >0 and a.store_id = #{store_id} and a.mch_id = #{mch_id} and (p.product_title like concat('%', #{key},'%') or p.id =#{key}) and p.commodity_type=0

mapper.select: select count(1) from lkt_flashsale_addgoods a LEFT JOIN lkt_product_list p ON a.goods_id = p.id LEFT JOIN lkt_configure AS c ON a.attr_id = c.id LEFT JOIN lkt_product_class cls ON cls.cid = substring_index( substring_index( p.product_class, '-', 2 ), '-', - 1 ) LEFT JOIN lkt_brand_class brand ON brand.brand_id = p.brand_id
